race.comment: The penny has dropped for COLONEL PARKER (1) who has put back-to-back wins together this campaign and is racing high on confidence of late. Winning jockey Morrison sticks in the stirrups and should be going very close again. THAT'S IT (7) has a handy record here on his home circuit with two wins and six placings from 16 spins. Gets Wiggins on from a favourable draw and should be there when the judge calls a halt. LOOK AT ROSA (8) is a two-time winner here who gets in light with the claim. Top-three credentials. TALONS (3) saves his best form for this course and distance with a win and three seconds from seven attempts. A must for the multiples. KAJETAN (10) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
